defs: The quality or state of being preponderant; superiority or excess of weight, influence, or power, etc.; an outweighing.
quotes: The mind should . . . reject or receive proportionably to the preponderancy of the greater grounds of probability.
In a few weeks he had changed the relative position of all the states in Europe, and had restored the equilibrium which the preponderance of one power had destroyed.

defs: The excess of weight of that part of a canon behind the trunnions over that in front of them.
